metadata.description: BERNARD — Orchestrateur multi-agents IA pour Claude Code (18 agents specialises, memoire MCP persistante, cost-aware tiering). Marketplace de distribution du plugin BERNARD as a Service.

plugins.name: bernard
plugins.description: BERNARD as a Service — Orchestrateur Claude Code + 18 agents specialises (1 orchestrateur + 17 experts : tech, produit, design, ops, finance, legal, secu, data, AI tooling) + commandes workflow + skills d'audit et de deploy AM + hooks avances (guard elargi DELETE/push-force, ELENA/CASEY, memory-hygiene, bash-audit-log, pre-compact-snapshot, session-end-summary) + 11 routines scheduled + MCP agent-memory
